summary: Add curated read-only commands and checkout preview helpers for safe DoorDash agent use.
reason: Agents need higher-level read-only search/menu/item/recent-order/address/payment flows and a fee/checkout preview that cannot place an order; raw GraphQL commands are too easy to misuse.
validated_outcome: go test -vet=off ./internal/cli -run 'TestReadOnlyCommandsRegistered|TestParse' passed; ./scripts/smoke-doordash-cli.sh passed; installed CLI which resolves 'search restaurants' and 'checkout preview'
